purpose: Block stage-to-stage movement unless the emitted handoff packet is valid, receipt-backed, and honest about authority.
passConditions: packet authorityStatus matches the stage output posture
all required receipts are present with required status
cognitive packets include provider dispatch, response, and invocation receipts
deterministic packets include resolver, gate, test, materialization, or parity receipts
candidate-only packets are not consumed as promoted authority
green packets reference an earlier red packet
durable truth packets are produced only by SOG promotion
completionPosture: A handoff packet is a receipt-backed stage contract. It carries authority posture, but gates and SOG promotion still decide authority.
